TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Earl_Boykins, title = Earl_Boykins, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Earl_Boykins} }

S.FORM: Earl Boykins (u kamu nu Hulam: 美國NBA ·安東·博伊金斯) Earl Boykins nalecuhan i Cleveland, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. 6 bulad 2 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Earl Boykins, miunduay.
S.PHON: əarr~ɾ bojkins (u kamu nu ħur~ɾam: **nba ********) əarr~ɾ bojkins nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦr~ɾə*ər~ɾand, oħio, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, əarr~ɾ bojkins, miunduaj.
S.FORM: Earl Boykins (u kamu nu Hulam: 美國NBA ·安東·博伊金斯) Earl Boykins nalecuhan i Cleveland, Ohio, nanu syubay kanas-mali miunduay nu Amilika NBA nisakaput, pahanhanan tu kawaw ayza. 6 bulad 2 demiad, 1976 a mihca, Earl Boykins, miunduay.
S.PHON: əarr~ɾ bojkins (u kamu nu ħur~ɾam: **nba ********) əarr~ɾ bojkins nar~ɾəʦuħan i ʦr~ɾə*ər~ɾand, oħio, nanu sjubaj kanas-mar~ɾi miunduaj nu amir~ɾika nba nisakaput, paħanħanan tu kawaw ajza. * bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, əarr~ɾ bojkins, miunduaj.
